summary: Full backend + frontend verification of the viral launch package (Stripe Studio checkout + holding deposit, AHD sidebar taxonomy, $25K unlock status strip, QuickstartModal, ShareKit/SocialProofRail/CohortBar, referral capture, /checkout/success polling). All 77 pytest pass (68 prior + 9 new launch tests). Real Stripe test-mode checkout sessions verified end-to-end including Mongo payment_transactions persistence and status polling. Landing virality kit, dashboard quickstart, and the full landing→Stripe→success flow are conversion-ready.
critical_code_review_comments: launch_router.py uses Pydantic models + 502 on Stripe exceptions + idempotent subscription grant on both polling-status and webhook paths — solid implementation.

payment_transactions row is correctly created BEFORE returning to frontend (line 111) so a missed redirect can be reconciled later via webhook. Verified in Mongo: row inserted, then status updated from 'initiated' to 'open' on first poll.

Stripe webhook path is implemented but cannot be regression-tested without real Stripe events firing; the polling fallback path (/api/checkout/status/{sid}) covers most real-world cases and was exercised live.
Social-proof anchored baselines (operators+312, runs+3191, cycles+1842, merges+12) are intentional per problem statement — documented behavior, not a bug.
QuickstartModal localStorage key is `pev5.quickstart.seen` (verified by clearing it and reload triggers auto-open). Re-open button works regardless of seen flag.

Referral capture writes to localStorage key `pev5.ref` and is correctly forwarded into POST /api/checkout/session as `referral_code` — verified the Studio CTA payload contained {referral_code:'VIRAL2026'} after visiting /?ref=VIRAL2026.
Sidebar AHD taxonomy verified: 9 Operations + 6 Revenue + 4 System = 19 links, all 19 testids match and labels match exactly.
Status strip $25K unlock pill shows live 38% derived from $9,623 / $25,000 — driven by backend revenue ledger, not hardcoded.
/api/launch/cohort closes_at falls back to 14 days from now when there's no waitlist entry — sane default for first-launch state.
Minor: launch_router build_router function is ~200 lines but cohesive (Stripe + launch + referral are related to the launch surface). Acceptable; splitting into 3 sub-routers is optional polish.
test_credentials: none required — Stripe API key sk_test_emergent already in /app/backend/.env, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY already set.
seed_data_creation: Tests inserted into Mongo: payment_transactions (2 rows from Studio session creation + polling), referral_clicks (1 row for TEST_VIRAL2026, plus 2 for VIRAL2026 from landing visits). All test data is prefixed with TEST_ where applicable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe is in real test mode — POST /api/checkout/session with package_id='studio_monthly'|'studio_annual'|'holding_deposit' returns a working cs_test_xxx URL. Mongo collection payment_transactions tracks every session; status_polled updates it idempotently. Landing /?ref=CODE captures into localStorage `pev5.ref` and forwards to checkout/session as referral_code. Sidebar uses AHD taxonomy (19 links). QuickstartModal auto-opens via localStorage `pev5.quickstart.seen` flag and is re-openable from the status strip. /checkout/success polls /api/checkout/status with 8 retries. All 77 pytest pass — run with `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v`. No regressions in 11-agent fleet, Cash AI apr_004 still pinned, distillation stats intact.
verified_e2e_flow: Visit /?ref=VIRAL2026 → ref captured to localStorage → click Studio Start → POST /api/checkout/session {package_id:'studio_monthly', origin_url, referral_code:'VIRAL2026'} → 200 with cs_test_xxx URL → would redirect to Stripe → on return, /checkout/success?session_id=cs_test_xxx → polls /api/checkout/status/{sid} every 2s up to 8 attempts → 'Confirming with Stripe… attempt N/8' loader → on paid, grants subscription + records referral conversion.
